evidence: The paper uses Ranger (RF-based importance) only as a binary feature selector with threshold importance>30: "each band with an importance value of greater than 30 was reserved as a sensitive band." Conclusions depend entirely on held-out validation R^2/RMSE comparing predictive models (ANN vs RF), never on importance ranking or magnitude. No p-value testing of importance. Final recommendations state: "Ranger algorithm...screen the hyperspectral data, and nonlinear algorithms, such as RF and ANN, should be applied for modeling"—purely model-selection conclusions backed by cross-validated predictive metrics.
